.alert{text-align:left;box-sizing:border-box;position:relative;font-size:1.071rem;padding:11px 62px 10px 50px;min-height:44px}[dir=rtl] bento-alert .alert{text-align:right;padding:11px 50px 10px 62px}bento-alert .alert a{text-decoration:underline}bento-alert .alert a:hover{opacity:.9}bento-alert .alert:before{font-family:bento-icons;font-style:normal;font-weight:400;font-size:1.429rem;line-height:1;position:absolute;left:5px;width:40px;text-align:center;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased}[dir=rtl] bento-alert .alert:before{left:auto;right:5px}bento-alert .alert button.close{align-items:center;background:transparent;border-radius:15px;border:none;display:flex;font-size:.8em;height:24px;justify-content:center;line-height:.8em;opacity:1;padding:0;position:absolute;right:10px;text-align:center;text-shadow:none;top:10px;width:24px}[dir=rtl] bento-alert .alert button.close{right:auto;left:10px}bento-alert .alert button.close i{font-family:bento-icons;top:0;font-style:normal}bento-alert .alert button.close:focus{outline:none}bento-alert .alert button.close:hover{transition:background .3s}bento-alert .alert button.close:hover i{transition:color .1s}bento-alert .alert-dismissable .close{top:0}bento-alert .bento-alert{box-shadow:2px 2px 6px #0000004d;margin-bottom:5px;transition:opacity .5s,filter .5s}bento-alert-inline bento-alert .bento-alert{box-shadow:none}bento-alert .alert-container{left:50%;min-width:300px;position:fixed;top:37px;transform:translate(-50%);z-index:1000000}bento-alert .alert-container:focus{outline:none}bento-alert .alert-container.right{left:auto;right:20px;transform:translate(0)}[dir=rtl] bento-alert .alert-container.right{left:20px;right:auto}bento-alert .alert-container.right>div{width:auto;max-width:100%;display:inline-block}bento-alert .alert-container.left{left:20px;transform:translate(0)}[dir=rtl] bento-alert .alert-container.left{left:auto;right:20px}bento-alert.bento-alert-inline .alert-container{z-index:auto;display:block;position:relative;top:auto;left:auto;width:100%;min-width:0;transform:none;-ms-transform:none;-webkit-transform:none}@media (min-width: 1200px){bento-alert .alert-container{width:40%}}@media (min-width: 992px) and (max-width: 1199px){bento-alert .alert-container{width:55%}}@media (min-width: 768px) and (max-width: 991px){bento-alert .alert-container{width:75%}}@media (max-width: 767px){bento-alert .alert-container{width:80%}}bento-alert .bento-alert-container{display:block;transition:.2s linear all}bento-alert .bento-alert-container.ng-enter{opacity:0}bento-alert .bento-alert-container.ng-enter.ng-enter-active{opacity:1}bento-alert .bento-alert-container.ng-leave{overflow:hidden;opacity:1}bento-alert .bento-alert-container.ng-leave.ng-leave-active{opacity:0}bento-alert 0 20px;display:block;text-align:center;border-width:1px;border-style:dashed;overflow:hidden}bento-file-selector.disabled{pointer-events:none}bento-file-selector .bento-progressbar{opacity:0;overflow:hidden;position:absolute;transition:bottom .2s,opacity .2s;width:auto}bento-file-selector .bento-file-selector-progress-percentage-label{display:none;opacity:0;transition:opacity .2s;-webkit-user-select:none;-moz-user-select:none;-ms-user-select:none;user-select:none}bento-file-selector.bento-file-selector-in-progress .bento-progressbar{opacity:1}bento-file-selector.bento-file-selector-in-progress .bento-file-selector-progress-percentage-label{opacity:1}bento-file-selector.bento-file-selector-progress-percentage .bento-file-selector-progress-percentage-label{position:absolute;width:35px;font-size:.9em;text-align:right;display:block}bento-file-selector>button{margin-top:10px}bento-file-selector .header{display:block;font-size:16px}bento-file-selector.dragover div,bento-file-selector.dragover span,bento-file-selector.dragover button,bento-file-selector.dragover input{pointer-events:none}bento-file-selector .dragover-overlay{bottom:0;left:0;overflow:hidden;position:absolute;right:0;top:0;transition:opacity .1s}bento-file-selector .filename-container{position:relative;display:block;padding:10px;max-width:100%;min-height:52px}bento-file-selector .filename-container .bento-file-selector-filename{position:relative;margin:5px 5px 5px 0;text-transform:none;padding-right:20px;white-space:nowrap}[dir=rtl] bento-file-selector .filename-container .bento-file-selector-filename{margin:5px 0 5px
